name: Tamayuratei no Ohanashi
description: Once upon a time, there was a youkai that roamed Inazuma in the form of a lantern's flame. This must once have been one of its vessels.

upgrades.description: Increase ATK by 20% and Movement SPD by 10% for 10s when using an Elemental Skill.
Increase ATK by 25% and Movement SPD by 10% for 10s when using an Elemental Skill.
